mapper.insert: INSERT INTO time_record (employee_id, task_id, start_time, end_time, description) VALUES (#{employeeId}, #{taskId}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{description})
mapper.select: SELECT id, employee_id AS employeeId, task_id AS taskId, start_time AS startTime, end_time AS endTime, description FROM time_record WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, employee_id AS employeeId, task_id AS taskId, start_time AS startTime, end_time AS endTime, description FROM time_record
